description: §40.1.1 — an app with no auth gate names no redirect target, so the per-gate redirect-resolution loop has nothing to check and I-AUTH-REDIRECT-UNRESOLVED does not fire. The clean control.
rationale: §40.1.1: with no auth gate declaring a redirect, the resolution loop's `if (redirect == null) continue` short-circuits every iteration, so I-AUTH-REDIRECT-UNRESOLVED stays silent.
